covid_surveillance.short_description: Weekly covid surveillance data from Wisconsin Department of Health Services
covid_surveillance.long_description: Wisconsin Department of Health Services collects and reports covid surveillance data weekly. Data covers emergency department visits, hospitalizations, laboratory-confirmed cases, and/or percent positivity.

wi_dph.name: Wisconsin Department of Health Services
wi_dph.description: Wisconsin Department of Health Services provides weekly respiratory surveillance data for Wisconsin covering pathogens including: covid, influenza, rsv, adenovirus, enterovirus, metapneumovirus, parainfluenza, pneumonia, ili, ari . Data is published via state health department dashboards and reports. Temporal coverage: ~2019-ongoing. Geographic coverage: state level.
wi_dph.restrictions: Public domain state government health data.
